title: Create Overpowered
description: Create Overpowered supercharges your Minecraft experience with features like automated ore farms, hyperenchanted apples for powerful buffs, and blaze paste for blaze cake crafting.
body:
![The mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7478a3c5987c4eacb2f5c9959e2aa49c7e75261.png) 
Create Overpowered is an addon to the create mod that as it's name may suggest, adds just overpowered stuff to the game like recipes to make diamonds, netherite, gold, iron and many more stuff really cheaply, so if you dont like early game like i do then the mod should be perfect for you, It also adds some overpowered armors and im activly working on making some blocks with kinetic energy involved so stay tuned.
